title: collabium ovalifolium
intro: Collabium ovalifolium, also known as Collinsonia, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Collabium ovalifolium include relieving digestive issues, soothing respiratory problems, and supporting skin health due to its astringent and antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Collabium ovalifolium can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is also used topically in creams and ointments for skin issues.
